tasks.name: Frame Assembly
tasks.description: Assemble the carbon fiber main frame and landing gear.

tasks.name: Motor Mounting
tasks.description: Secure the brushless motors to the frame arms.

tasks.name: ESC Calibration
tasks.description: Install and calibrate the Electronic Speed Controllers.

tasks.name: Power Distribution
tasks.description: Solder connections to the Power Distribution Board (PDB).

tasks.name: Flight Controller Setup
tasks.description: Mount the flight controller and configure initial firmware.

tasks.name: Receiver Binding
tasks.description: Bind the radio receiver to the transmitter.

tasks.name: GPS & Telemetry
tasks.description: Install GPS module and test telemetry transmission.

tasks.name: Maiden Flight
tasks.description: Perform first hover test and tune PID values.
